reason: Verified that the agent "QA-20260714-223054-hfuf" successfully receives a message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responds with "4" within 1 second.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully showing the sidebar with available agents.
Step 2 - Found and clicked the "QA-20260714-223054-hfuf" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded and navigation to agent detail view was successful.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle" which meets the requirement.
Step 4 - Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message was successfully entered in the input field (ref=e172).
Step 4 (continued) - Clicked the Send message button — Message was submitted successfully and the chat view was displayed.
Step 5 - Waited for response from the agent — Response received in 1 second (well within the 3-minute timeout). The agent processed the message and provided an immediate answer.

Step 6 - Verified the response mentions "4" and took screenshot — The agent responded with exactly "4" as the answer to the math question. Screenshot saved as agent_response.png showing the user's message on the right ("Hello! What is 2+2?") and the agent's response "4" on the left, with "Worked for 1s" indicating the processing time.
